parsed.availability_comment: Available on current evidence, but public reporting on him individually is sparse.
parsed.availability_note: No injury, suspension, or delayed-arrival report found; domestic player status reduces absence risk.

parsed.playing_xi_comment: Auctioned as a wicketkeeper-batter; sits behind Pant, Pooran, Inglis and other batting options, so first-XI path looks remote barring injuries.
